content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6

## Summary

The success reconciliation implementation is well-structured, correct, and thorough. It covers all acceptance criteria: idempotent bead close (with double-check on failure), sync after close (unconditional even on replay), milestone progress updates with journal recording, next-step hint capture from bv (best-effort with atomic write-then-rename persistence), and task-to-bead linkage via outcome_detail + structured task_id extraction. The daemon_loop integration correctly routes BrCloseFailed/BrSyncFailed to task failure (needs-operator) rather than silently proceeding, and intentionally avoids transitioning milestones to Failed (terminal) to preserve retryability. Tests cover all key paths including an end-to-end test. All 10 reconciliation tests pass, full suite (757 tests) passes. No clippy warnings in modified files. No bugs, safety problems, or correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
